description: Shared deterministic workflow route metadata for the Mythify CLI and MCP server.

routes.description: Recover from the latest failed executed verification before starting unrelated work.
Use or resume a durable campaign for long-running one-shot or continuous project work.
Use a bounded outcome loop when the user provides success criteria and a verifier, or an active outcome is already in progress.
Create or continue source-backed research before implementation when the task depends on external or uncertain information.
Use review or audit workflow when the user asks for findings, risks, critique, or evaluation.
Resume an active plan or current workflow state without assuming hidden chat context.
Create a verifiable plan for ordinary multi-step implementation work.
Render a prompt packet when the user asks for steering material rather than immediate execution.
Answer directly or make a single reversible edit when no durable workflow is needed.
